name: STANDEX INTERNATIONAL CORP/DE/
business: Standex International Corporation is a diversified industrial manufacturer with leading positions in a variety of products and services used in diverse commercial and industrial markets. It operates through six operating segments aggregated into five reportable segments: Electronics, Engineering Technologies, Scientific, Engraving, and Specialty Solutions. The company delivers custom solutions or engineered components to solve customer needs, focusing on customer intimacy.

exposures.sentence: Our sensing products employ reed switch, Hall effect, inductive, conductive and other technologies.
Our grid technologies products include instrument transformers, current sensors and bushings.

End-user markets include, but are not limited to, appliances, electrification (electric vehicles, solar, smart-grid, alternative energy), military, medical, aerospace, test and measurement, power distribution, security, general industrial applications, and transportation.

End-user markets include, but are not limited to, appliances, electrification (electric vehicles, solar, smart-grid, alternative energy), military, medical, aerospace, test and measurement, power distribution, security, general industrial applications, and transportation.
The defense market we serve covers a wide spectrum of applications including components and sub-assemblies for missiles, naval propulsion, and military aircraft nacelle and engine solutions.

End-user markets include, but are not limited to, appliances, electrification (electric vehicles, solar, smart-grid, alternative energy), military, medical, aerospace, test and measurement, power distribution, security, general industrial applications, and transportation.
The space market we serve is comprised of components and assemblies for space launch vehicles, engines, crewed and uncrewed spacecraft and other space infrastructure.
Our Scientific business specializes in providing specialty temperature-controlled equipment for the medical, scientific, pharmaceutical, biotech, and industrial markets.

catalysts.event: Release over fifteen new products in fiscal year 2026, projected to contribute approximately 300 bps of incremental growth.
catalysts.sentence: We plan to release over fifteen new products which are projected to contribute approximately 300 bps of incremental growth.
